data_sources: Etsy Seller Handbook seasonal lead-time guidance
Etsy holiday calendar industry analyses (ListifyAI 2026, Marmalead, Insight Agent)
Wedding industry data (April-October US peak months)
meta.notes: All dates verified for 2026. list_by_date is auto-computed (event_date - lead_time_weeks * 7 days). Lead times follow Etsy SEO best practice: 8-10 weeks for major gift holidays, 6-8 for medium, 4-6 for minor, 12+ for wedding/event planning niches. Etsy ranking algorithm typically takes 3-6 weeks to mature new listings.

importance_levels.major: Top-priority sales event — must list within lead time window
importance_levels.minor: Promo-timing only, not a themed product launch trigger

meta.niches_reference: Niche IDs in recommended_niches map to niches.json database from the Coaster Niche Profit Scanner tool. The two tools are designed to work together.

events.name: New Year's Day
events.summary: Year-themed coasters and 'New Year, New Home' housewarming gifts. Buyers planning fresh-start home decor refreshes.
events.design_angles: 'Cheers to 2026' typography. Champagne flute illustrations. 'New Year, New Home' for housewarming sub-niche. Minimalist gold-on-white aesthetic.
events.pro_tip: Most buyers tired of holiday-themed gifts by Jan 1. Pivot designs to FRESH START / NEW HOME / GOALS rather than continued Christmas vibes.

events.name: National Hot Toddy Day
events.summary: Niche drink day — cocktail recipe coaster opportunity.
events.design_angles: Hot toddy recipe coaster (lemon + honey + whiskey + clove). Winter cabin aesthetic.
events.pro_tip: Bundle in '5 winter cocktail recipes' coaster set — outperforms single-drink listings.

events.name: Martin Luther King Jr. Day
events.summary: Not a major coaster sales event but a federal holiday — useful for promo/sale timing rather than themed product launches.
events.design_angles: No specific themed coasters recommended (avoid commercializing the civil rights commemoration).
events.pro_tip: Run a general 'MLK Day weekend sale' rather than themed listings. Use this 3-day weekend for traffic-driven promos.

events.name: Engagement / Wedding Planning Season Peak
events.summary: Dec-Feb is peak engagement season. 40% of US engagements happen between Thanksgiving and Valentine's Day. Newly-engaged couples start planning weddings in January-February for spring/summer ceremonies.
events.design_angles: 'Just Engaged' / 'Future Mrs.' aesthetics. Save-the-date inspired coaster designs. Wedding planning checklist coasters as bridal party gifts.
events.pro_tip: January = highest Pinterest traffic for wedding terms. Pin your wedding favor designs in early January. List 'wedding favor coasters' by early Feb to capture spring/summer wedding planners 4-6 months out.

events.name: Black History Month
events.summary: All-February observance. Afrohemian Decor is a Pinterest Predicts 2026 trend (80-100% search increase for related terms). Strong window for Afrohemian-style coasters.
events.design_angles: African textile patterns, mudcloth motifs, Adinkra symbols, terracotta + sage + cream palette. Afrohemian Decor aesthetic.
events.pro_tip: Pinterest 2026 trend report calls out 'Afrohemian Decor' explicitly. Sub-niche of boho with major growth window.

events.name: Groundhog Day
events.summary: Pop culture reference day — not a gifting event.
events.pro_tip: Skip themed listings — no real demand.

events.name: Galentine's Day
events.summary: Feb 13. Female friendship celebration that's exploded as a buying occasion since 2020. Strong for funny/sarcastic and wine-themed coasters as friend gifts.
events.design_angles: 'Galentine's' typography. Wine + champagne + bestie humor. Coquette aesthetic with bow motifs. 'Friendship is the wine of life' quotes.
events.pro_tip: Galentine's gift sets (set of 4 different designs) outperform single coasters. 'Coquette aesthetic' is the breakout sub-style — pink bows + cursive 'best friend'.

events.name: Valentine's Day
events.summary: Top 4 coaster sales event of the year. Romantic couples buy personalized coasters for partners. Peak buyer search window: Jan 10 - Feb 12.
events.design_angles: His + Hers (and Hers + Hers / His + His for inclusive sets). Names + 'Est. [year]' typography. Heart motifs. Coordinates of where you met. 'First Valentine's' premium niche for new couples.
events.color_palette: Deep red + dusty pink + ivory + gold OR coquette pink + black ribbon
events.pro_tip: List by Dec 6 latest for SEO ranking by Jan 10. Last-minute shoppers (Feb 10-13) want fast shipping — offer expedited. 'First Valentine's' personalized commands premium AOV.

events.name: Presidents' Day
events.summary: Federal holiday — used for sales/promo timing rather than themed launches.
events.pro_tip: Run weekend promos (Feb 14-16) for an extra Valentine's revenue tail.

events.name: National Drink Wine Day
events.summary: Niche drink celebration — solid for wine lover coaster sub-niche.
events.design_angles: Wine varietal coasters (Cabernet, Pinot, Rosé as separate designs). 'Tastes like Tuesday' wine mom humor.
events.pro_tip: Bundle 'Sommelier sip set' (6 varietals) for premium pricing vs single quote coasters.

events.name: National Margarita Day
events.summary: Margarita-themed coaster opportunity — cocktail recipe niche.
events.design_angles: Margarita recipe coaster as part of cocktail set. Pair with bachelorette/cinco-de-mayo seasonality.
events.pro_tip: Drink-day listings are evergreen if you tag 'cocktail recipe' as primary — they sell year-round, not just on the day.

events.name: Spring Bridal Shower Season Begins
events.summary: Spring/summer wedding showers cluster March-May. Brides-to-be order favors and decor 6-8 weeks before their shower.
events.design_angles: 'Miss to Mrs', 'Bride to Be', champagne + pearl motifs, dusty pink + champagne palette.
events.color_palette: Champagne + dusty pink + ivory + soft sage
events.pro_tip: Bridal showers are a TWO-MONTH-AHEAD purchase. Buyers planning April-May showers buy in March. Tag 'bridal shower 2026' specifically.

events.name: Women's History Month
events.summary: Empowerment-themed coasters — strong for office gifting context.
events.design_angles: Inspirational quotes by historical women (public domain or paraphrased). 'Boss energy' typography. Suffragette purple palette.
events.pro_tip: Avoid trademarked quotes/likenesses. Use public domain figures (Susan B. Anthony, Eleanor Roosevelt).

events.name: Cottagecore Spring Aesthetic Window Opens
events.summary: Cottagecore peaks twice a year (spring + fall). Pinterest 2026 forecasts continued strength. Spring window: March-May, especially around Easter.
events.design_angles: Wildflower bouquets, mushrooms, fern fronds, watercolor botanicals, vintage book plate illustrations, dusty sage + butter cream palette.
events.color_palette: Butter cream + sage + dusty rose + soft brown
events.pro_tip: Cottagecore aesthetic still strong per Pinterest 2026 Predicts. Spring window is peak Pinterest traffic for this niche — list by early March to ride the curve.

events.name: St. Patrick's Day
events.summary: Irish pub / drinking culture. Strong for funny coaster sub-niche and pub-themed home bars. Also bank holiday in Northern Ireland.
events.design_angles: Shamrock motifs, 'Kiss me I'm Irish' humor, Guinness-inspired (generic stout — not branded), Irish whiskey humor, Irish blessings typography.
events.pro_tip: St. Patrick's Day humor coasters sell as gag/party gifts. Avoid trademarked brands (Guinness, Jameson). Use generic 'Irish stout' references.

events.name: Mother's Day (UK / Mothering Sunday)
events.summary: UK Mother's Day is COMPLETELY DIFFERENT date from US (March 22 vs May 10 in 2026). Critical for UK-targeted sellers. Falls on 4th Sunday of Lent.
events.design_angles: 'Mum' (not Mom) typography for UK market. British florals (English wildflowers, hydrangea). 'World's Best Mum' personalization with kids' names.
events.color_palette: Soft pink + cream + sage + dusty lavender
events.pro_tip: If targeting UK buyers: use 'Mum' spelling and ship-from-UK if possible. List 8 weeks before March 22 = list by late January.

events.name: Spring Equinox / First Day of Spring
events.summary: Marks the official start of spring aesthetics. Spring florals, pastels, garden motifs hit peak search.
events.design_angles: Tulips, daffodils, cherry blossoms. Pastel palettes. Fresh green + butter yellow + dusty pink.
events.color_palette: Butter yellow + sage + dusty pink + cream
events.pro_tip: Refresh shop banner / photos with spring aesthetics by mid-March. Even if products don't change, listing photos with spring styling boost CTR.

events.name: April Fools' Day
events.summary: Not a gift day — minor humor coaster relevance.
events.design_angles: Skip themed listings.
events.pro_tip: Skip — no commercial pull.

events.name: Easter Weekend
events.summary: Easter brunch gifting and spring bridal/baby showers cluster around this weekend. Good Friday + Easter Sunday + Easter Monday (UK).
events.design_angles: Pastel Easter eggs (no Disney references), spring florals, 'Hop into spring' humor for car coasters, 'Bunny mama' kid-friendly. Garden + brunch table aesthetics.
events.color_palette: Pastel pink + sage + butter yellow + lilac
events.pro_tip: Easter brunch host gifts = micro-spike. Spring shower season uses Easter as date anchor for gifting timing.

events.name: National Pet Day
events.summary: Strong pet coaster sales day. Pet owners self-purchase + gift to fellow pet parents.
events.design_angles: Custom pet portrait coasters (line art from photo). 'Furparent' typography. Specific breed illustrations.
events.pro_tip: Don't lead with 'memorial' for this day — celebrate living pets. Save memorial angle for Pet Memorial Day (Sep).

events.name: Kentucky Derby (First Saturday in May — list now)
events.summary: Kentucky Derby falls on May 2, 2026. Derby party hosts buy themed coasters 2-4 weeks before. List by mid-April latest.
events.design_angles: Mint julep recipe coaster. Horse silhouettes. 'Run for the Roses' typography. Derby hat motifs. Kentucky bourbon trail map.
events.pro_tip: Mint julep recipe coaster is the iconic Derby coaster. Sell as 'Derby party kit' bundle with horse + julep + roses designs.

events.name: Administrative Professionals Day
events.summary: Wednesday of the last full week of April. Office gift sub-niche.
events.design_angles: 'Office MVP' / 'Best admin ever' typography. Coffee mug illustrations. Spreadsheet humor.
events.pro_tip: Bosses buy this — corporate gift opportunity. Bulk order angle works (5-20 sets at once).

events.name: 🚨 LIST BY: US Mother's Day (May 10)
events.summary: If you haven't listed US Mother's Day coasters by now, you've missed the peak SEO window. Listings made after this date will struggle to rank by May 10.
events.design_angles: 'Mom of [kids' names]'. Wildflower bouquets. First Mother's Day premium. 'Bonus Mom' / 'Step Mom' underserved sub-niche.
events.pro_tip: Last call. List remaining Mother's Day inventory NOW or you're chasing the spring tail. Use 'gift for mom from daughter' as primary keyword.

events.name: Early May Bank Holiday (UK)
events.summary: Long weekend in UK — minor commercial day, run promo timing.
events.pro_tip: UK shoppers off work — good for weekend promo sale.

events.name: Teacher Appreciation Week (May 4-8)
events.summary: First full week of May. Tuesday (May 5) is National Teacher Day. Parents buy 1-2 personalized coasters per child's teacher.
events.design_angles: 'Best teacher ever' + 'Mrs. [name]' personalization. Apple + book + pencil motifs. Subject-specific (math/English/science). 'Powered by caffeine and dry erase markers' humor.
events.color_palette: Apple red + chalkboard black + cream + warm yellow
events.pro_tip: Subject-specific coasters outperform generic. Personalized 'Mrs. Johnson' coasters = premium AOV. 'Preschool teacher' specifically searched.

events.name: Cinco de Mayo
events.summary: Margarita + tequila party theme. Limited coaster opportunity but bundles work.
events.design_angles: Margarita recipe + tequila cocktails. Avoid cultural stereotypes — keep designs to drink-themed only.
events.pro_tip: Drink-day timing only — not a major sales event. Use as add-on to cocktail recipe listings.

events.name: National Nurses Week (May 6-12)
events.summary: Begins May 6 (National Nurses Day), ends May 12 (International Nurses Day / Florence Nightingale's birthday). Nurse population is large — strong gift opportunity.
events.design_angles: Stethoscope motifs, 'Trust me I'm a nurse' humor, RN/BSN credentials, specialty-specific (ICU, ER, NICU, L&D, oncology). 'Saving lives one coffee at a time' humor.
events.color_palette: Medical scrub teal + clean white + soft pink
events.pro_tip: Specialty-specific (ICU vs ER vs NICU) converts better than generic 'nurse gift'. Spouses + grateful patients are key buyer segments.

events.name: Mother's Day (US)
events.summary: MAJOR coaster sales event. Adult children + spouses buying for moms. Personalized = high AOV. Peak buyer search window: Mar 15 - May 8.
events.design_angles: 'Mom of [kids' names]' personalization. Wildflower bouquets. Heart + family motifs. Birth flowers + kids' birthdays. 'First Mother's Day' premium with baby photo.
events.pro_tip: List by March 15 latest. 'First Mother's Day' photo coasters = highest AOV. 'Step Mom' / 'Bonus Mom' underserved and high-converting. Offer expedited shipping May 5-9.

events.name: College Graduation Peak (mid-May to early June)
events.summary: College + high school graduations cluster mid-May to mid-June. Parents/grandparents/friends buy commemorative gifts. Advanced degree grads (PhD, JD, MD) = 2-3x AOV.
events.design_angles: 'Class of 2026' typography (single year focal). Diploma roll motifs. School color palettes (no trademarks). Subject-specific (law, medical, engineering grads). 'Dr. [Name] DVM/PhD/MD' premium personalization.
events.pro_tip: Already late if you haven't listed by mid-March. PhD/MD/JD/DVM graduation premium ($35-60) outperforms generic 'congrats grad'.

events.name: National Wine Day
events.summary: Coincides with Memorial Day in 2026.
events.design_angles: Wine varietal coasters. 'Wine + summer = perfection' typography.
events.pro_tip: Bundle with summer drinking theme — Memorial Day kicks off summer entertaining season.

events.name: Memorial Day / Summer Kickoff
events.summary: Federal holiday + cultural start of summer entertaining season. Patriotic coasters + summer host-gift surge.
events.design_angles: Subtle patriotic (stars, stripes — tasteful, not gaudy). Summer BBQ host gifts. Lake house housewarming.
events.pro_tip: Avoid overdone patriotic kitsch. Sell summer entertaining sets (cocktail recipe + national park) for Memorial Day weekend hosts.

events.name: Wedding Peak: May-June (US)
events.summary: May-June are top wedding months in US (along with September-October). Wedding favor coasters ordered 8-12 weeks before ceremony.
events.design_angles: Names + date personalization. Rustic wood, slate, vinyl-record shapes. Place card coaster premium tier. Bachelorette city-specific (Nashville, Miami).
events.pro_tip: Bachelorette weekends cluster 6-10 weeks before wedding date — list bachelorette coasters by early March for May-July wedding weekends.

events.name: Pride Month
events.summary: June. Inclusive couple coasters + LGBTQ+ pride themes have strong gift market.
events.design_angles: Rainbow palette tasteful (not full prism — pastel pride, subtle). 'His + His' / 'Hers + Hers' / 'Theirs + Theirs' inclusive couple sets. 'Love is love' typography.
events.pro_tip: Year-round 'His + His' / 'Hers + Hers' couple coaster listings benefit from Pride Month boost. List inclusive variants explicitly — don't hide in heteronormative defaults.

events.name: National Bourbon Day
events.summary: Father's Day week timing — bourbon coasters double as Father's Day gifts. Strong cross-niche window.
events.design_angles: Kentucky bourbon trail map. Distillery region illustrations (no trademarks). 'Pour Decisions' / 'Whiskey wisdom' typography. Bourbon barrel motifs.
events.pro_tip: Bourbon Day immediately precedes Father's Day (Jun 21). Bundle as Father's Day gift kit — premium AOV.

events.name: Juneteenth National Independence Day
events.summary: Federal holiday commemorating end of slavery. Not a major themed gifting day — promo timing only.
events.design_angles: Avoid commercializing the commemoration with themed product lines.
events.pro_tip: Honor the day with sale/promo timing, not product themes.

events.name: Father's Day (US + UK)
events.summary: US AND UK Father's Day fall on the same date in 2026 (June 21). Spouses + kids buy for dads. Whiskey, golf, fishing, BBQ niches peak.
events.design_angles: 'Best Dad' + custom 'Dad of [kids' names]'. Whiskey + golf + fishing crossover. 'First Father's Day' baby photo premium. 'Step Dad' / 'Bonus Dad' / 'Papa' / 'Grandpa' segmented.
events.color_palette: Walnut brown + forest green + cream + brass
events.pro_tip: List by April 26. Father's Day = peak window for whiskey/golf/fishing niches across the entire year. 'First Father's Day' photo coasters = highest AOV.

events.name: Summer Solstice / First Day of Summer
events.summary: Coastal / beach aesthetic peak begins. Lake house + beach house decor purchasing surge.
events.design_angles: Coastal motifs (shells, waves, palm fronds), 'Lake life', sunset palettes, surf town aesthetics.
events.color_palette: Sandy beige + ocean blue + sun-bleached white + soft coral
events.pro_tip: Beach house / lake house housewarming gifts spike June-August. Specific city/lake destinations (e.g., 'Lake Tahoe coaster') outperform generic beach.

events.name: Independence Day
events.summary: Saturday in 2026 (observed Friday July 3). BBQ host gifts + summer entertaining. Subtle patriotic.
events.design_angles: Modern patriotic (subtle navy + cream + cranberry rather than red-white-blue gaudy). BBQ host gift bundles. State outline motifs. Lake house / cabin scenes.
events.pro_tip: July 4 = HUGE host gift surge (BBQs, family gatherings). Sell as 'summer entertaining bundle'.

events.name: Bachelorette Weekend Peak (July)
events.summary: Bachelorette weekends concentrated late June - August for fall weddings. Destination-specific (Nashville, Miami, Austin) sells hottest.
events.design_angles: 'Nashville Bach', 'Miami Bach', 'Last Sip as a Single Girl'. Disco ball + cowgirl hat (Nashville) or beach + palm (Miami). Custom bride name.
events.pro_tip: Last-minute purchases (3-7 day production needed). Top destinations 2026: Nashville #1, Miami #2, Austin #3, Charleston, Scottsdale.

events.name: Back-to-School Aesthetic Window
events.summary: Y2K dorm decor + dark academia coasters peak July-September. Gen Z students furnishing apartments + dorms.
events.design_angles: Y2K hot pink + chrome + butterflies. Dark academia vintage book + Latin phrases. Coquette pink bow aesthetic. 'Dorm essentials' marketing angle.
events.color_palette: Y2K: hot pink + chrome | Dark academia: burgundy + walnut + cream
events.pro_tip: Y2K is EXPLODING per Pinterest 2026. Tag aggressively for 'dorm decor' (peak Aug). Coquette + Y2K cross-promotion captures Gen Z.

events.name: 🚨 LIST BY: Halloween (Oct 31)
events.summary: Halloween listings need 6-10 weeks to rank. List by mid-August for SEO maturation by buyer-search start (mid-September).
events.design_angles: Cute ghosts ('boo-tique'), vintage Halloween illustrations, witchy moon phases, pumpkin patches, skeletons (year-round decor sub-trend), 'witchy not bitchy'. PINK/PASTEL HALLOWEEN is the breakout aesthetic.
events.color_palette: Classic: black + orange | Trendy: muted pink + purple + black
events.pro_tip: Pink/pastel Halloween is UNDERSUPPLIED relative to demand. Skeletons as year-round decor is a sub-trend — tag for 'spooky season home decor'.

events.name: National Dog Day
events.summary: Strong dog coaster sales day. Dog owners self-purchase + dog-mom gifting.
events.design_angles: Custom dog portrait from photo. Breed-specific illustrations (Frenchie, Dachshund, Golden Retriever big sellers). 'Dog mom' / 'Dog dad' typography.
events.pro_tip: Don't lead with memorial (save for Sep Pet Memorial Day). Focus on celebrating living dogs. Breed-specific outperforms generic.

events.name: UK Summer Bank Holiday
events.summary: Final UK summer long weekend — promo timing for UK shoppers.
events.pro_tip: Run UK-targeted promo via Etsy ads geo-targeting.

events.name: 🚨 LIST BY: Christmas Products
events.summary: Christmas listings need 10-12 weeks to rank. List by early September latest. Late October listings will not rank in time.
events.design_angles: Family name + '2026' year focal. Modern Christmas palettes (pink + champagne OR plaid). Personalized 'The [Lastname] Family Christmas 2026'. Stocking-stuffer sizing.
events.color_palette: Modern: pink + champagne + green | Classic: red + green + gold
events.pro_tip: START NOW. By mid-October, late-listed Christmas coasters will struggle to rank. Etsy's algorithm needs 4-6 weeks; buyers start searching by late October.

events.name: Labor Day
events.summary: End-of-summer long weekend. BBQ host gift micro-spike. Marks the unofficial transition to fall.
events.design_angles: Late-summer entertaining themes. 'Last hurrah of summer' typography optional.
events.color_palette: Late summer: sun-bleached cream + cranberry + denim
events.pro_tip: Use Labor Day weekend as the natural promo pivot — switch shop banner from summer to fall aesthetics the Tuesday after.

events.name: National Pet Memorial Day
events.summary: 2nd Sunday of September. Strong emotional gifting day — grief sympathy + memorial gifts for pet owners.
events.design_angles: Pet photo + name + DOB-DOD dates. 'Rainbow Bridge' poem excerpts. 'Always in our hearts'. Slate + dark wood materials.
events.pro_tip: Highest-emotion purchase in the calendar = highest AOV. Offer rush production. Include sympathy card in shipment.

events.name: Cottagecore Fall Aesthetic Peak
events.summary: Cottagecore's biggest annual window. Mushrooms + autumn botanicals peak on Pinterest Sep-Nov.
events.design_angles: Mushrooms (toadstool, amanita), pumpkins (cottage style, not Halloween), wheat sheaves, vintage botanical, dried flowers, candle + book composition. Burnt orange + cream + sage palette.
events.color_palette: Burnt orange + sage + dusty cream + walnut brown
events.pro_tip: Cottagecore fall window is the #1 sales season for the entire niche. Sublimation works beautifully for vintage botanical detail.

events.name: Fall Equinox / First Day of Autumn
events.summary: Marks the shift to fall aesthetics in shop photos + product styling.
events.design_angles: Pumpkin + maple leaves + cinnamon + wool textures.
events.color_palette: Burnt orange + walnut + cream + forest green
events.pro_tip: Refresh shop banner + lifestyle photos for fall by Sep 22. Even unchanged products benefit from seasonal restyling.

events.name: National Coffee Day
events.summary: Coffee lover coasters peak — but coffee niche is saturated. Differentiate with specialty angle.
events.design_angles: Specialty drink names (cortado, flat white, cold brew, oat milk latte). Specific roastery regions (Ethiopian, Colombian, Guatemalan). Coffee bar setup aesthetic.
events.pro_tip: Avoid generic 'But First Coffee'. Specialty/regional differentiation wins. 'Cold brew' / 'oat milk' Gen Z angles are underserved.

events.name: Bourbon Heritage Month (all September) → Crossover Whiskey Sales
events.summary: Bourbon Heritage Month is all of September. Sales continue into early October as gift season approaches.
events.design_angles: Same as National Bourbon Day. Distillery trails. Kentucky outline. Barrel illustrations.
events.pro_tip: Pair Bourbon Heritage + early Christmas listing for whiskey-dad gift bundle positioning.

events.name: Indigenous Peoples' Day / Columbus Day
events.summary: Federal holiday — promo timing only.
events.pro_tip: Avoid themed products. Use weekend for general fall promo.

events.name: National Veterinary Technician Week (Oct 11-17)
events.summary: 3rd full week of October. HIGHLY UNDERSERVED niche — vet/vet tech gift market is significantly smaller in supply than demand.
events.design_angles: Stethoscope + paw print combo. 'Vet life' typography. DVM/RVT/LVT credentials. Specific animal silhouettes (dog/cat/exotic). 'Veterinary medicine: where every patient bites' humor.
events.color_palette: Vet scrub teal + paw print brown + cream
events.pro_tip: One of the LEAST competitive professional gift niches. Pet owners ALSO gift their vets — broader buyer base than just vet families.

events.name: National Boss's Day
events.summary: Office gift sub-niche.
events.design_angles: 'World's okayest boss' humor. 'Boss [first name]' personalized. Office desk decor.
events.pro_tip: Lower-priority single day. Bundle with general 'work humor' listings.

events.name: Sweetest Day
events.summary: 3rd Saturday in October. Romantic gift day primarily in Midwest US — secondary to Valentine's.
events.design_angles: Reuse Valentine's couple coaster designs. 'Sweetest day' typography variant.
events.color_palette: Same as Valentine's: red + pink + cream
events.pro_tip: Repurpose Valentine's listings with 'Sweetest Day' tag for additional revenue from existing inventory.

events.name: National Cat Day
events.summary: Cat coaster niche is significantly less saturated than dog. Strong day for cat-specific designs.
events.design_angles: Custom cat portrait. Breed-specific (Maine Coon, Tabby, Black Cat). Whisker + paw motifs. 'Cat mom' / 'Cat lady' typography.
events.pro_tip: Cat niche is OPPORTUNITY GOLD — less competition than dog. Breed-specific (especially Black Cat - Halloween crossover, Maine Coon, Bengal) underserved.

events.name: Halloween
events.summary: Saturday in 2026 — peak party/host day. Halloween coaster niche is RISING. Pink/pastel Halloween + skeletons as year-round are top sub-trends.
events.design_angles: Cute ghosts (boo-tique), vintage Halloween illustrations, witchy moon phases, pumpkin patches, skeletons, 'spooky season'. Black + pink palette = breakout trend.
events.color_palette: Classic: black + orange | Trendy: pink + purple + black | Witchy: deep purple + gold + black
events.pro_tip: If you haven't listed by now, you've missed peak window. Last-minute Halloween shoppers (mid-Oct) want fast shipping. Black cat coasters spike around Halloween.

events.name: 🚨 LIST BY: Valentine's Day 2027
events.summary: Valentine's Day 2027 (Feb 14, 2027) is 14 weeks out. List couple coasters by mid-November for Etsy ranking maturation in early January.
events.design_angles: 'First Valentine's Together' baby/newborn-of-the-year couples. 'Est. 2026' for newly engaged. Coquette aesthetic continuation.
events.color_palette: Red + pink + cream + gold | Coquette: pink + black bow
events.pro_tip: Get Valentine's listings UP by November. Etsy needs 4-6 weeks to rank; buyers start searching mid-January.

events.name: Bonfire Night (Guy Fawkes Day) UK
events.summary: UK-specific cultural night. Minor commercial opportunity.
events.design_angles: Skip themed listings — not a major gift day.
events.pro_tip: Use as UK promo timing if running geo-targeted campaigns.

events.name: Remembrance Sunday (UK)
events.summary: UK memorial day. Avoid commercialization.
events.pro_tip: Pause promotional emails the morning of for UK list.

events.name: Veterans Day
events.summary: Federal holiday honoring veterans. Veteran-themed coasters (tasteful military service tributes) have niche audience.
events.design_angles: Subtle military service tributes only. Avoid trademarked branch logos. Generic 'Thank you for your service' personalization with name + service branch text.
events.pro_tip: Tag carefully — military service themed products require careful trademark/IP awareness around branch insignia.

events.name: Thanksgiving
events.summary: Host gifts surge in week before Thanksgiving. Less of a personalized-gift holiday — more about cozy + farmhouse host coasters.
events.design_angles: 'Gather' / 'Thankful' / 'Grateful' typography. Pumpkins + wheat + autumn leaves. Modern farmhouse plaid. Cocktail recipe coasters for holiday hosts.
events.color_palette: Burnt orange + cream + sage + walnut + cranberry
events.pro_tip: Last-minute host gift purchases drive 30% of Thanksgiving coaster sales. Tag 'thanksgiving host gift' and 'hostess gift'.

events.name: Black Friday
events.summary: Biggest shopping day of the year. Etsy's Cyber Sales event typically Nov 24 - Dec 2.
events.design_angles: Use existing Christmas inventory. Bundle deals (set of 4 → set of 8 promo). 'Buy now, gift later' positioning.
events.pro_tip: Opt into Etsy Cyber Sales 25%+ discount campaign by mid-October to be featured in Etsy promo emails. Bundle pricing tiers (4/8/12 sets).

events.name: Small Business Saturday
events.summary: Day after Black Friday. Etsy actively promotes #SmallBusinessSaturday.
events.pro_tip: Run extra-strong promo Saturday. Lean into 'small business' / 'maker' story in shop announcement.

events.name: Cyber Monday
events.summary: Last major shopping day before Christmas shipping cutoffs.
events.pro_tip: Run final 'last chance for guaranteed Christmas delivery' urgency promo. Calculate shipping cutoff dates and display prominently.

events.name: Hanukkah (Dec 4-12)
events.summary: Hanukkah-themed coasters are highly underserved. 8 nights of gifting = repeat purchase opportunity.
events.design_angles: Menorah motifs, Star of David, dreidel illustrations, 'Happy Hanukkah' / 'Chag Sameach' typography. Blue + silver + white palette.
events.pro_tip: Christmas dominates discussion but Hanukkah is a HIGHLY underserved gift niche. List Hanukkah coasters by mid-October for 2026 ranking. Sets of 8 (one per night) work conceptually.

events.name: Christmas Eve
events.summary: Last-minute Christmas + Christmas Eve box stocking stuffer demand.
events.design_angles: Christmas Eve box / stocking stuffer sizing (single coaster or small set). 'Night before Christmas' aesthetic.
events.color_palette: Same as Christmas: red + green + gold OR pink + champagne
events.pro_tip: Local pickup / digital download tags capture last-minute panic buyers. Digital coaster designs (PNG for sublimation) shine for Dec 23-24 purchases.

events.name: Christmas Day
events.summary: THE BIGGEST sales event of the year. Peak buyer search window: Oct 25 - Dec 22. Etsy seasonality concentrates ~25% of annual GMV here.
events.design_angles: Family name + '2026 Christmas' year focal. Personalized 'The [Lastname] Family Christmas 2026'. Modern Christmas palettes (pink + champagne is exploding trend). Stocking stuffer sizing. Office Secret Santa positioning.
events.color_palette: Classic: red + green + gold | Modern: pink + champagne + sage | Cozy: cream + plaid + cranberry
events.pro_tip: If your Christmas listings aren't ranking by mid-November you've LOST 2026. Focus on annual repeat purchases — families buy yearly. 'Christmas 2026' (specific year) creates urgency for collectors.

events.name: Boxing Day / UK Boxing Day Substitute
events.summary: UK shopping day — Boxing Day sales tradition. Etsy UK sees secondary spike.
events.design_angles: Use existing Christmas + New Year inventory. Bundle promos.
events.pro_tip: UK Boxing Day shoppers buy heavily-discounted Christmas/New Year items. Schedule UK-targeted 30%+ discount.

events.name: New Year's Eve
events.summary: Champagne + party host gifts. Also National Champagne Day.
events.design_angles: Champagne flute illustrations. 'Cheers to 2027' typography. New Year's resolution humor. Disco ball motifs.
events.pro_tip: Bundle 'NYE party kit' with cocktail recipe + champagne coasters. Limited window — last call by Dec 22.
